results.resolved_title: Nucleotide sequence of an Escherichia coli chromosomal hemolysin.
results.quote: All four hemolysin cistrons (transcriptional order, C, A, B, and D) were encoded on the same DNA strand, and their predicted molecular masses were, respectively, 19.7, 109.8, 79.9, and 54.6 kilodaltons.
results.note: E. coli paper: hlyA is the 109.8 kDa hemolysin cistron; hlyB/hlyD (T1SS transporter) in same determinant. Organism matches.

results.resolved_title: Nucleotide sequence of an Escherichia coli chromosomal hemolysin.
results.note: Paper is the E. coli chromosomal hemolysin sequence; makes no claim about Chromobacterium violaceum. Cited as source for an unrelated-species homolog.

results.resolved_title: Nucleotide sequence of an Escherichia coli chromosomal hemolysin.
results.note: Paper sequences hlyC/hlyA/hlyB/hlyD; ehxA (plasmid-borne enterohemolysin) is a distinct gene not discussed.

results.resolved_title: Nucleotide sequence of an Escherichia coli chromosomal hemolysin.
results.note: E. coli hemolysin sequence; no claim about Suttonella indologenes. Source paper cited for unrelated-species homolog.

results.resolved_title: Enzymes on microbial pathogens and Trichomonas vaginalis: molecular mimicry and functional diversity.
results.note: DOI resolves to an Alderete et al. review on Trichomonas vaginalis/microbial enzyme molecular mimicry. Not about EspF, EPEC/E. coli O157, or T3SS.

results.resolved_title: Enzymes on microbial pathogens and Trichomonas vaginalis: molecular mimicry and functional diversity.
results.note: DOI resolves to an Alderete et al. review on Trichomonas vaginalis/microbial enzyme molecular mimicry. Not about EspF, EPEC, or T3SS.

results.resolved_title: Heterochromatin protein 1 secures survival and transmission of malaria parasites.
results.note: DOI resolves to a Plasmodium falciparum HP1/gene-silencing paper. Not about PldA, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, or T6SS.

results.resolved_title: Heterochromatin protein 1 secures survival and transmission of malaria parasites.
results.note: DOI resolves to a Plasmodium falciparum HP1/gene-silencing paper. Not about PldB, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, or T6SS.

results.resolved_title: Bacterial OTU deubiquitinases regulate substrate ubiquitination upon Legionella infection
results.quote: Here, we describe two novel OTU-like DUBs in Legionella – LotB (Lpg1621; Ceg23) and LotC (Lpg2529).
results.note: Paper identifies LotB (Lpg1621) among Legionella Dot/Icm (type IVb) effector proteins; locus tag lpg1621 matches.

results.resolved_title: Bacterial OTU deubiquitinases regulate substrate ubiquitination upon Legionella infection
results.quote: Here, we describe two novel OTU-like DUBs in Legionella – LotB (Lpg1621; Ceg23) and LotC (Lpg2529).
results.note: LotC (Lpg2529) identified among Legionella Dot/Icm (type IVb) effector proteins; locus tag lpg2529 matches.

results.resolved_title: Inhibition of Phagocytosis by Haemophilus ducreyi Requires Expression of the LspA1 and LspA2 Proteins
results.quote: These results indicate that the LspA1 and LspA2 proteins of [H. ducreyi] are involved, directly or indirectly, in the antiphagocytic activity of this pathogen
results.note: Abstract-only (full text empty). LspA1/LspA2 are large secreted/antiphagocytic proteins of H. ducreyi 35000HP; found in culture supernatant. LspA1/A2 are the canonical two-partner-secretion (T5b) TpsA exoproteins. Organism matches.

results.resolved_title: Inhibition of Phagocytosis by Haemophilus ducreyi Requires Expression of the LspA1 and LspA2 Proteins
results.quote: These results indicate that the LspA1 and LspA2 proteins of [H. ducreyi] are involved, directly or indirectly, in the antiphagocytic activity of this pathogen
results.note: Abstract-only. LspA2 (with LspA1) a large secreted antiphagocytic protein of H. ducreyi 35000HP, detectable in culture supernatant. Organism matches.

results.resolved_title: Rapid disappearance of a warm, dusty circumstellar disk.
results.note: DOI resolves to an astronomy paper (Melis et al.) about a circumstellar disk around star TYC 8241 2652 1. Not about OspC3, Shigella, or T3SS.

results.resolved_title: Role of CypA and Hsp90 in membrane translocation mediated by anthrax Protective Antigen
results.note: Paper is about Bacillus anthracis lethal toxin (PA/LF) translocation via host CypA/Hsp90. Not about Brucella abortus, RicA, or a T4SS effector.

results.resolved_title: Secretion of the Serratia marcescens HasA protein by an ABC transporter.
results.quote: HasA has a C-terminal targeting sequence and is secreted by a specific ATP binding cassette (ABC) transporter consisting of three proteins
results.note: HasA of Serratia marcescens is a secreted heme-binding protein exported by a three-component ABC (T1SS) transporter. Organism and gene match.

results.resolved_title: An extracellular zinc metalloprotease gene of Burkholderia cepacia.
results.quote: they are similar to the thermolysin-like family of metalloproteases (M4 family of metalloendopeptidases) and they are likely to be secreted via the general secretory pathway.
results.note: ZmpA is an extracellular zinc metalloprotease of B. cepacia/cenocepacia secreted via the general secretory pathway (GSP/T2SS terminal branch). Gene and organism (B. cenocepacia genomovar III K56-2) match.

results.resolved_title: The Legionella Effector SdjA Is a Bifunctional Enzyme That Distinctly Regulates Phosphoribosyl Ubiquitination
results.quote: both SdjA and SidJ are made and translocated into host cells likely during the entire intracellular life cycle of [Legionella]
results.note: SdjA is a Legionella Dot/Icm (T4SS) translocated effector. Caveat: paper assigns SdjA = Lpg2508, but the batch locus_tag is lpg2155 (annotation mismatch); gene name and organism match.

results.resolved_title: Aminoacyl-tRNA-Charged Eukaryotic Elongation Factor 1A Is the Substrate for Legionella Effector Glucosyltransferases
results.quote: Legionella ... translocates numerous effector proteins into the host cell cytosol by a type IV secretion system during infection. Among the most potent effector proteins ... are glucosyltransferases (lgt's)
results.note: Lgt3 (lpg1488) is a Legionella Dot/Icm (T4SS) effector glucosyltransferase that modifies host eEF1A; locus tag lpg1488 confirmed in Methods. Organism and gene match.

results.resolved_title: VasH Is a Transcriptional Regulator of the Type VI Secretion System Functional in Endemic and Pandemic Vibrio cholerae
results.quote: the contribution of the activator of the alternative sigma factor 54, VasH, as a global regulator of the [V. cholerae] T6SS
results.note: Abstract-only. VasH is characterized as a cytoplasmic sigma-54-dependent transcriptional regulator/activator of T6SS genes, not as a secreted T6SS substrate/effector. Same protein and organism, but no secretion/effector role.

results.resolved_title: A Type VI secretion system delivers a cell-wall amidase to target bacterial competitors
results.quote: the type VI secretion system locus II (H2-T6SS) of [P. aeruginosa] delivers AmpDh3 (but not AmpD or AmpDh2) to the periplasm of a prey bacterium upon contact.
results.note: AmpDh3 (PA0807) is a VgrG2b-dependent H2-T6SS substrate/effector of P. aeruginosa PAO1; locus tag PA0807 and gene match.
